channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned rubbish by MIND shop, 5th June
item.description:
I reported this the other day, the report came back as problem is resolved. Clean up crew took some bags but left the rest of the rubbish. Also MIND do this several times a week, possibly have a chat with them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped large sheets of unidentified white material propped up against the fence and road. Could fall, and unsure what the material is., 5th June
item.description:
This was dragged here this morning at 5am by an unknown male and left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bracken Hill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From just below St Anne's Close to the lower entrance to St Anne's Church on Highate West Hill., 5th June
item.description:
There are a series of potholes, terrible repairs, cracks in the road and general carnage in the road from just below St Anne's Close to around the lower entrance of St Anne's Church. It is dangerous to cycle on. It is specifically mainly on the left hand side of the road as you are going up the hill. Many manhole covers also make the road surface very uneven and inconvenient and dangerous for cycling. Shoddy repairs and general neglect has made the road horrible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Highgate West Hill, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The stretch of Perry Street adjacent to Queen Mary University Sports Ground is full of cracks, divers and pot holes, 5th June
item.description:
My house (11 Homewood Crescent) backs onto Perry Street opposite the Queen Mary Sports Ground and when lorries and buses drive past the poor quality of the road makes my house vibrate and shake substantially. Can someone please come and survey the road as soon as possible as I am concerned this is damaging my house. This issue has been going on for the past month or so. Many thanks for your help in this matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 5th June
item.description:
Long row of shrubs has litter in under and in it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catlin Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 5th June
item.description:
Smell bad.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pointer Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported twice, 4th June
item.description:
FixMyStreet ref: 9551834. Reported previously Apparently is “fixed” ! No, it isn’t! Why do you mark as “resolved “ ? Why lie to the public, we live here and it’s easy for us to see that it’s not been resolved! Cleaning team passes by many times this pile of rubbish! Why not take it away?! This matter will be escalated higher! Thanx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Colegrove Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light on no entry sign hanging by cable over pavement, 4th June
item.description:
In Bromley on the corner where Ronalds Road meets Station Road, there is a No Entry sign on a post. The light to illuminate it is broken, and is dangling over the pavement in a way that isn't safe. Please see the photo. I took this photo on 3.6.2026.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Babbacombe Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive growth, 4th June
item.description:
Base growth obstructing pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 379, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste, 4th June
item.description:
Food waste around yellow bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 blocked drains, 4th June
item.description:
3 x drains outside 15a Page Heath Lane blocked with leaves and mud causing flooding to adjacent homes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldo Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x drains on Bird In Hand Lane / Page Heath Lane both blocked with mud and leaves causing flooding, 4th June
item.description:
2 drains on Bird In Hand Lane / Page Heath Lane both blocked with mud and leaves causing flooding.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Page Heath Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still small rubbish in flowerbeds, 4th June
item.description:
Appreciate some work has been done on cleaning the street and flower beds, but there is still so much small rubbish in the flower beds - cigarette butts, bottle tops, small bits of plastic etc. Please please properly clean up the flower bed - particularly the middle flower bed just behind the seats.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rainton Road - full of litter, 4th June
item.description:
Hi, Please clean this street asap. It's constantly full of litter. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CPZ signage obscured by spray paint, 4th June
item.description:
CPZ parking bay sign obscured by spray paint (outside 89 Comber Grove)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 285, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolleys, 4th June
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove these shopping trolleys asap. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Shopping Trolleys, 4th June
item.description:
Hi there, There are lots if shopping trolleys next to Old Fire Station Apartments - please remove them. Thanks, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area is persistent to fly tipping! The area needs to be properly maintained., 4th June
item.description:
There is persistent fly tipping here - please can this be cleaned as soon as possible as to not attract further fly tipping - thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Darwin Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of litter, 4th June
item.description:
There is lots of litter next to Alan's Plants on the corner - area indicated in the pictures. Please remove it, this us third time I'm reporting this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping next to Old Fire Station Apartments, 4th June
item.description:
Hi there, Please remove this fly-tipping. This is a common area for it and should be monitored regularly or have CCTV installed. Thanks, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
